instruction: When wiring ROS2SubscribeTwist.outputs:linearVelocity (double3) to DifferentialController.inputs:linearVelocity (double), OmniGraph warns: type double3 is not compatible with type double. This causes broken connections and can destabilize rendering.
response: ROS2SubscribeTwist outputs double3 vectors. DifferentialController expects scalar double. Use a Break3Vector node to extract the x-component for linear speed and z-component for angular speed. NEVER wire double3 → double directly.

instruction: PhysX error on all Nova Carter wheels: "triangle mesh collision (approximation None/MeshSimplification) cannot be a part of a dynamic body, falling back to convexHull". Affected: wheel_left, wheel_right, caster_swivel_left/right, caster_wheel_left/right.
response: Set collision approximation to convexHull on all wheel prims before sim play: prim.GetAttribute("physics:approximation").Set("convexHull"). This must be done on every wheel/caster link of mobile robots.

instruction: IsaacArticulationController OmniGraph node warns about joint name "joint_drive_fl" — Nova Carter does not have joints named joint_drive_fl/fr. The actual front drive joint names are joint_wheel_left and joint_wheel_right.
response: Nova Carter joint names: joint_wheel_left, joint_wheel_right (front drive), joint_caster_swivel_left/right, joint_caster_wheel_left/right (passive rear). DifferentialController must target only joint_wheel_left and joint_wheel_right.

    def snake(s):

                out.append("_")
            out.append(ch.lower())
        return "".join(out)
    parts = [snake(p) for p in parts]
    return "/" + "/".join(parts)

def _safe_set_translate(prim, pos):
    """Set translate, reusing existing op if present."""
    xf = UsdGeom.Xformable(prim)
    for op in xf.GetOrderedXformOps():
        if op.GetOpType() == UsdGeom.XformOp.TypeTranslate:
            op.Set(Gf.Vec3d(*pos))

    xf.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3d(*pos))

    """Set scale, reusing existing op if present."""
    xf = UsdGeom.Xformable(prim)
    for op in xf.GetOrderedXformOps():
        if op.GetOpType() == UsdGeom.XformOp.TypeScale:
            op.Set(Gf.Vec3d(*s))
            return

            op.Set(Gf.Vec3d(*r))

    frozen = 0
    for prim in Usd.PrimRange(robot):

        drive.CreateTypeAttr("force")

        drive.CreateStiffnessAttr(5000.0)   # stiff: pins position
        drive.CreateDampingAttr(200.0)
        drive.CreateMaxForceAttr(1e6)
        frozen += 1
    print(f"Froze {frozen} Inspire Hand joints at neutral.")
